synopsis: The New Republic faces deadly adversaries! Mon Mothma and Leia must make a difficult decision to deal with a defiant Imperial hell-bent on preserving the legacy of Palpatine and Vader! Luke hunts for a lost Jedi relic but makes a startling discovery! The underworld simmers with intrigue as an unholy alliance is formed! A ragtag group of New Republic heroes sets out on a mission, and their return is not guaranteed!
title: Battle of Jakku: Insurgency Rising #02
